categories.name: Pattern Recognition & Navigation
categories.description: Tools for querying, traversing, and transforming the APL253 pattern topology mapped to GitHub and software domains.

categories.name: Skill Engineering
categories.description: Tools for decomposing, transforming, composing, and sharing skills across domains using structural analogy and the General Relevance Transform.

categories.name: Code Generation & Scaffolding
categories.description: Tools for generating project scaffolds, skill stubs, extensions, and opinionated web application stacks.

categories.name: Language Design & DSLs
categories.description: Tools for designing and building domain-specific languages including grammar definitions, parsers, lexicon extraction, and validation.

categories.name: Cognitive Computing
categories.description: Tools for building and operating cognitive development kernels based on Plan 9, Inferno-OS, and OpenCog architectures.

categories.name: Scientific & Mathematical Computing
categories.description: Tools for analyzing formulations, generating neural network topologies, modeling brain-inspired computation, and numerical analysis.
